title: Check the Current Status and Task for a Tote
summary: Use the Get Tote Task function in the tote management API view to retrieve the current tote task and review the tote's current status and task information.
when_to_use: Use when support or operations needs to see the current status of a tote and its assigned task information using the Get Tote Task function shown in the training.
not_for: Do not use for changing tote assignments or exchange behavior; the source only supports viewing current tote task/status information in this procedure.
Do not use when a corrective interpretation of a mismatched status is required; the source does not provide further interpretation logic in this segment.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the tote management interface, retrieve the tote task information, review the returned status/task details, and record observations for troubleshooting or follow-up.

safety_notes: This source describes a status lookup function and does not describe a physical intervention.
Do not invent corrective actions from the returned status; escalate if the returned status does not match the observed system condition and no interpretation is provided by the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to tote management interface or API-backed Get Tote Task function

access_required: Access to the tote management interface or API page that includes Get Tote Task
system_preconditions: A tote identifier is available for the tote being inspected

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the tote management API features, including Get Tote Task.

steps.title: Open Get Tote Task in the tote management interface
steps.purpose: Navigate to the function used to retrieve current tote task information.
steps.instruction: Open the tote management function for Get Tote Task on the API page shown in the training.
steps.expected_result: The Get Tote Task function is visible and ready to use.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote management API page shows Get Tote Task among the available tote management features.
steps.failure_condition: The Get Tote Task function cannot be located or accessed.

actions.label: Open Get Tote Task
actions.exact_action: Open the tote management function for Get Tote Task.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: API Features for Tote Management list showing Get Tote Task on the tote management page.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Get Tote Task function cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Aveva API page lists API Features for Tote Management: Add Tote, Remove Tote, Get Tote Task, Resend Tote Task, Exchange Tote, Exchange Lane, and Get Exchange Settings.

steps.title: Enter or select the tote to inspect
steps.purpose: Identify which tote's current task information should be retrieved.
steps.instruction: Enter or select the tote to inspect using the available tote identifier.
steps.expected_result: The target tote is selected for lookup.
steps.healthy_condition: A tote identifier is available and the intended tote is selected for retrieval.
steps.failure_condition: The tote identifier is unavailable or the tote cannot be selected.

actions.label: Select tote
actions.exact_action: Enter or select the tote to inspect.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the tote identifier is not available.
Escalate if the tote cannot be selected for lookup.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: Get Tote Task — Retrieves the current tote task.

steps.title: Retrieve the tote task information
steps.purpose: Request the current tote task data from the Get Tote Task function.
steps.instruction: Retrieve the tote task information for the selected tote.
steps.expected_result: The system returns the current tote task information.
steps.healthy_condition: The current tote task information is returned for the selected tote.
steps.failure_condition: The tote task information cannot be retrieved.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Get Tote Task function on the tote management API page used to retrieve current tote task information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the tote task information cannot be retrieved.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR: Get Tote Task — Retrieves the current tote task.
Get tote task shows you what the current status of the totes, all their tasks.

steps.title: Review the returned status and task details
steps.purpose: Interpret the returned lookup at a basic observational level to understand the tote's current state and task details.
steps.instruction: Review the returned current status and task details for that tote.
steps.expected_result: The current tote status and task details are visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The returned information clearly shows the tote's current status and task information.
steps.failure_condition: The returned information is missing, unclear, or does not match the observed system condition.

actions.label: Review returned tote details
actions.exact_action: Review the returned current status and task details for that tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Example tote task detail fields such as Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the returned status does not match the observed system condition and the source provides no further interpretation.
Escalate if the returned details are missing or cannot be understood from the available source guidance.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Get tote task shows you what the current status of the totes, all their tasks.
Tote Task interface lists fields including Tote ID, AGV ID, Original Destination, Station, Task ID, Task Name, and Tote Error.

steps.title: Record the observed tote status and task information
steps.purpose: Preserve the observed status/task information for troubleshooting or operational follow-up.
steps.instruction: Record the observed tote status and task information for troubleshooting or operational follow-up.
steps.expected_result: The observed tote status and task information is documented for later use.
steps.healthy_condition: The current status and task information has been captured accurately from the returned result.
steps.failure_condition: The information cannot be recorded completely because the returned result is unavailable or unclear.

actions.label: Document tote status
actions.exact_action: Record the observed tote status and task information for troubleshooting or operational follow-up.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the returned information cannot be retrieved or is too unclear to document reliably.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Get tote task shows you what the current status of the totes, all their tasks.

success_criteria: The Get Tote Task function is accessed.
A tote is selected using a tote identifier.
Current tote task information is returned.
The tote's current status and task details are reviewed.
The observed status and task information is recorded for troubleshooting or follow-up.
healthy_conditions: The tote management API page includes Get Tote Task.
The selected tote returns current status and task information.
Returned details are visible enough to support troubleshooting or operational follow-up.
failure_conditions: The Get Tote Task function cannot be accessed.
The tote cannot be identified or selected.
The tote task information cannot be retrieved.
The returned status does not match the observed system condition and the source provides no interpretation.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the tote task information cannot be retrieved.
Escalate if the returned status does not match the observed system condition and the source provides no further interpretation.
Escalate if the Get Tote Task function is unavailable in the accessible interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote management API page showing Get Tote Task.
Example tote task detail fields that may appear when reviewing returned tote task information.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Get tote task shows you what the current status of the totes, all their tasks.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact button names, field entry mechanics, or submission controls for Get Tote Task.
The source does not provide a precise navigation path to the tote management API page.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
The source does not define exact output formatting or a required documentation destination for recorded observations.
The source does not provide interpretation rules for specific tote statuses or task states.
